name: Pale Descendant
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Shield Generation +[StateArg3]%; the wielder's Defense inflicts [StateArg1]% of {Poison} on the enemy with the highest HP. If the current realm is {Caro}, when applying {Poison}, {Embryo Fusion} increases by [StateArg2]%. This effect triggers up to 3 times per turn.
